title: Massachusetts State Ethics Commission — Agency Landing Page
description: Scrape of the MA State Ethics Commission landing page. The Commission administers and civilly enforces the conflict-of-interest law (M.G.L. c.268A) and the financial-disclosure law, provides free advice to public employees, conducts mandatory ethics training, accepts public complaints, and publishes Statements of Financial Interests.
notes: No filing deadline on this landing page; c.268A complaint limitations period is generally 3 years. All MA public employees (including DDS state employees) are subject to c.268A and must complete periodic ethics training. File ~12.5 KB.
